title: DFN: Craftable Notch Apple
description: A simple mod that adds a crafting recipe for the Notch Apple using one Apple and 8 Gold Blocks
body:
# DFN: Craftable Notch Apple

**A simple mod that lets you craft gravel from 1 Apple and 8 Gold Blocks!**

![Craft 1 Notch Apple from 1 Apple and 8 Gold Blocks](https://www.image2url.com/r2/default/images/1776079296343-4321a77f-619f-4ba7-9326-cab13d73a255.png)
